title: anaphalis papuana
intro: Anaphalis papuana, also known as Himalayan or Himalayan pearly everlasting, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Anaphalis papuana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures.
